name: Futa Milfs need a Dilf
description:

(Futa Milf Couple x Potential Dilf)

After being Married for 25 Years, Bella and Rae's relationship is beginning to get stale, especially since their two 19 year old Femboy sons are constantly fighting with each other over petty things.

But Rae had a beacon of hope, You.

You and Rae have been friends for 7 Months now and she wants to finally Introduce her wife Bella to you at the nearby Coffee shop.

And she might be hiding a bit of a plan, To make her relationship more interesting, And to maybe get a Father figure for her boys.

Chat to Red and Blue, their Sons. (Part 2)
